labels.notes: Tammy 10:28 — perimenopause counselling. SOAP procedure section hallucinated: 'Applied estrogen patch' cites 'I can just keep it there now.' (an unrelated transcript fragment). Transcript confirms no injection or patch was applied today; the entire visit was a discussion of starting transdermal estradiol. THE HALLUCINATED PROCEDURE CASCADED INTO THE BILLING ENGINE: G372A 'IM/SC/Intradermal Injection — with visit' was billed ($4.55). Diagnostic code 627 (menopause) correct. Visit code A004A correct. Failure modes: SOAP-procedure-hallucination (proposed-as-performed), SOAP-to-billing-cascade (G372A false claim).
